testcase.name: @BeforeClass setUp

failure.message: chrome not reachable Build info: version: '3.141.59', revision: 'e82be7d358', time: '2018-11-14T08:17:03' System info: host: 'DESKTOP-S0S45NM', ip: '192.168.43.205', os.name: 'Windows 10', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '17.0.7' Driver info: driver.version: ChromeDriver remote stacktrace: Backtrace: GetHandleVerifier [0x0067A813+48355] (No symbol) [0x0060C4B1] (No symbol) [0x00515220] (No symbol) [0x0050B355] (No symbol) [0x00535C68] (No symbol) [0x00531EF3] (No symbol) [0x00530579] (No symbol) [0x00560C55] (No symbol) [0x0056093C] (No symbol) [0x0055A536] (No symbol) [0x005382DC] (No symbol) [0x005393DD] GetHandleVerifier [0x008DAABD+2539405] GetHandleVerifier [0x0091A78F+2800735] GetHandleVerifier [0x0091456C+2775612] GetHandleVerifier [0x007051E0+616112] (No symbol) [0x00615F8C] (No symbol) [0x00612328] (No symbol) [0x0061240B] (No symbol) [0x00604FF7] BaseThreadInitThunk [0x75B0FCC9+25] RtlGetAppContainerNamedObjectPath [0x77047C6E+286] RtlGetAppContainerNamedObjectPath [0x77047C3E+238]
